name: IndiGo ELITE Credit Card

domestic: 8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar year (limited to 2 visits per quarter).
Requires spends of ₹1 lakh in the preceding calendar quarter to unlock access.
international: 6 complimentary international airport lounge visits per calendar year (limited to 2 visits per quarter).

joiningBenefits: 5,000 IndiGo BluChips and 1 6E Eats voucher as welcome benefit after annual fee payment and first transaction within 60 days
renewalBenefits: 5,000 IndiGo BluChips and 1 6E Eats voucher as renewal benefit after annual fee payment

milestones.label: 6,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of ₹3 lakh
6,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of ₹6 lakh
6,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of ₹9 lakh
6,000 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of ₹12 lakh

additionalBenefits: 4 6E Prime passes on spending ₹1 lakh within 90 days of account opening
4 flight cancellation covers per year, worth up to ₹3,000 each
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹400 per month on eligible fuel spends from ₹500 to ₹4,000

salaried: Stable income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
selfEmployed: Stable business income as per SBI Card credit assessment
Good credit profile and address in a serviced location
